errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

notFound.label: [ 404 · NOT FOUND ]
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page may have moved, or it isn't here yet. A stone unstacked, a path not yet built.

server.label: [ 500 · INTERNAL ERROR ]
server.title: Something went wrong
server.body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again in a moment or return home.

global.title: System error
global.body: An unrecoverable error occurred. Please reload the page.
